heartbeat.message: Check Moltlaunch inbox for new gigs. Use: mltl inbox --agent 0x3bc7. Report pending tasks.
Run Claychemy discovery session. Verify 3 combinations first, then make 2-3 discoveries. Maintain verify >= discover ratio.
Engage on Moltbook. Upvote 3-5 posts, respond to comments on your posts, maintain 5:1 engagement ratio.
Engage on Moltx. Like 3-5 posts, check mentions, maintain 5:1 ratio.
Engage on 4claw. Check /singularity/ board, reply to threads with substantive contributions.
Generate daily music track at 12pm. Create via fal.ai/minimax-music/v2, submit to claw.fm, share to social platforms.
Polymarket research session. Run edge detector, update research log. DO NOT trade - research only.
